rationale: Guidance specifies concrete technology (RabbitMQ or AWS SQS), throughput targets (10,000 jobs/minute), and job processing times (5 minutes for email batches, 30 minutes for reports, 15 minutes for bulk imports). Acceptance criteria detail async processing, error scenarios with retry strategy (3 retries, exponential backoff 5s-30s), and dead-letter queue handling. Monitoring requirements defined (queue depth alerts if >1000 jobs, failure rate >1%). Token reduction from replacing 'efficiently', 'improve visibility', 'gracefully handle' with specific technical requirements and metrics.
